regions.us-ports: Today, Miami experiences SSE 9kt winds, clear skies, and less than 10% rain probability, with no expected impacts on port operations or shore excursions. Heat Advisory in effect for New Orleans (heat index up to 112°F). Over the next 48 hours and beyond, Miami will see overcast conditions with SSE 14kt winds on Days 1 and 2, and SE 11kt winds with thunderstorms on Day 3, all with less than 10% rain probability.
regions.bahamas-central-caribbean: Today, clear skies and light southeast winds of 5kt are prevailing in Nassau, with less than 10% rain probability. Over the next 24-48 hours, southeast winds of 13kt are expected to continue, with drizzle on Day 1 and rain showers on Day 2, both days having less than 10% rain probability, which may affect shore excursions in Nassau and Freeport. Beyond 48 hours, winds are forecast to shift to ESE at 14kt on Day 3, with overcast conditions and less than 10% rain probability in the Bahamas.
regions.eastern-caribbean: Today, a 25% rain probability may affect shore excursions in San Juan. Over the next 24-48 hours, winds will increase to 16kt on Day 1 and 15kt on Day 2, with a 25% rain chance on Day 1 and an 11% rain probability on Day 2, potentially impacting port operations in St. Thomas. By Day 3, a 32% rain probability may affect cruise ship operations in St. Maarten.
regions.western-caribbean: Today, clear skies and a gentle NNE 4kt wind prevail in Cozumel, with an 11% rain probability. Over the next 24-48 hours, Cozumel and nearby ports like Costa Maya may experience drizzle with an 11% rain probability on Day 1, and less than 10% rain probability on Day 2. By Day 3, overcast skies are expected in Cozumel, with winds shifting to ESE 7kt and less than 10% rain probability.
regions.southern-caribbean: Today, elevated winds of 18kt from the east and overcast conditions with a 19% rain probability are present in Aruba. Beyond 48 hours, winds are forecast to decrease further to 17kt on Day 3, with a 21% rain probability in Cartagena.
regions.lesser-antilles: Today, an ENE 12kt wind and overcast conditions with a 17% rain probability may affect shore excursions in Barbados. Beyond 48 hours, winds will shift to E 9kt with less than 10% rain probability, leading to favorable conditions for cruise ship operations in Grenada and St. Vincent.
regions.eastern-pacific: Today, clear skies and a 27% rain probability will allow for smooth shore excursions in Cabo San Lucas. Beyond 48 hours, drizzle and a 14% rain probability are expected in Cabo San Lucas on Day 3.
regions.los-angeles: Today, overcast conditions with a light wind of WSW 1kt and less than 10% rain probability will allow for normal port operations in Los Angeles / San Pedro. In the next 24-48 hours, foggy conditions with WSW 12kt winds are expected to affect Long Beach and Marina del Rey. Beyond 48 hours, a shift in wind direction to S 7kt and partly cloudy skies with less than 10% rain probability will impact Catalina Island.
regions.ensenada: Today, light winds from the southeast at 1kt and overcast skies with less than 10% rain probability will provide favorable conditions for embarkation and disembarkation in Ensenada. Beyond 48 hours, Ensenada and Islas Todos Santos can expect increased winds to 10kt from the west-southwest on Day 3, with overcast skies and less than 10% rain probability.
regions.cabo-san-lucas: Today, with clear skies and a 27% rain probability, Cabo San Lucas port operations are expected to proceed normally. Beyond 48 hours, drizzle and a 14% rain probability are forecast for Cabo San Lucas on Day 3.
regions.mazatlan: Today, thunderstorms with a 43% rain probability are expected to affect shore excursions in Mazatlan and Altata. regions.puerto-vallarta: Today, overcast conditions with a 24% rain probability may affect shore excursions in Puerto Vallarta. regions.western-mediterranean: Today, clear skies and a light SE 4kt wind are prevailing in Barcelona, with less than 10% rain probability, allowing for smooth port operations and shore excursions.
